name: 金曜ミステリークラブ!!!
original_name: 金曜ミステリークラブ!!!
overview:
Kazunari Ninomiya & Nobu Chidori’s new show is here!! A new investigative variety programme that delves into the truth behind the most baffling ‘mysteries’ and ‘whys’ that have actually occurred around the world!! An all-star line-up gathers for the premiere special!!

‘Viewers, it’s time to investigate…’
